purpose: Reusable authoring contract for single-agent checkpoint inhibitor protocols.
safety_principles: Do not inherit cytotoxic ANC or platelet hold thresholds unless explicitly present in the source protocol.
FBC abnormalities may trigger clinical review but are not assumed to be NCCP-mandated treatment holds.
Treatment modification is driven by immune-mediated toxicity, infusion reactions, infection, organ dysfunction and protocol-specific eligibility.
Endocrinopathies require syndrome-specific logic; controlled endocrinopathies on replacement therapy are not treated as automatic permanent-discontinuation events.
